## Related

<!-- OpenSpec change / issue, e.g. "Implements openspec/changes/... " or "Fixes #123" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated; **bug fixes include a regression test** that fails before the fix.
- [ ] `openspec validate --all --strict` passes (spec-first for medium/large features).
- [ ] Docs and `openspec/specs/` updated where behavior changed — no claim left contradicting the code.
- [ ] CI is green (C++ core + CLI + C API + OpenSpec).
- [ ] For backend/physics changes: the CPU-vs-backend parity tests still pass.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, how you verified it. -->
